name: Ep3: Clone Trouble! - Villain of the Smiling Critters
description:
Villain of the Smiling Critters - Episode: Clone Trouble!

This sucks, Your sick, You cant make evil plans.. For now, Because of that stupid snow storm, You cant even think straight with all this sneezing and coughing, It would be great if you had a- BINGO!
[Please comment under the "Story Choices" after chatting with the bot!]
